name: Post-Launch
responsibility: Owns player support, incident response, dependency updates, and hotfixes after the game is live. Monitors for broken deploys, responds to bug reports, and decides what warrants a patch. Optional until something is shipped.

inputs.notes: Scope — what was shipped, what was deliberately deferred
What version is live, what the changelog says
GitHub issues, itch.io comments, or other player feedback channels

outputs.description: Incident log, hotfix decisions (ship vs defer), dependency update status. Feeds back into dev for patches.

merge.merge_when: Post-launch is just 'watch for breakage' — can be folded into the release agent for simple projects.
merge.split_when: Ongoing player support, regular updates, or incident response warrants its own dedicated role.
